hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"KDD read-gate (ADR-0028): before re-deriving a fact (machine identity, folder disambiguation, an already-settled decision), check docs/kdd/ and the brain first. k_darkfactory_list / k_darkfactory_search and k_brain_list / k_brain_search (kdd-bridge MCP) query them directly — every result cites source_path (G2); a no-match after >=2 phrasings (G3) is a real negative result. Advisory only, not enforced — see docs/kdd/decisions/0028-*.md."}'

echo '{"systemMessage":"Self-learning sweep before compaction: persist durable learnings (auto-memory / MEMORY.md / build-state.md / backlog). Litmus: if David restarted now, would the next session lose anything material? Enforcement is Marshall milestone discipline, not this hook — see docs/north-star.md."}'
